seo.title: Pre- & Postnatal Cycle + Sculpt
seo.description: Stay fit and strong during your pre- and postnatal journey with these exclusive hybrid workouts from Super Trainer Elise Joan.

trainers.bioBodi: Barre Blend™ creator Elise Joan is a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. She is also the creator of Pre-/Postnatal Barre Blend and the “I Am” meditation series on Beachbody On Demand®. Deepen your mind/body connection and build a lean, shredded dancer’s physique with her barre, strength, yoga, and other live classes on BODi™.

data.descriptionShort: Stay fit and strong during your pre- and postnatal journey with these exclusive hybrid workouts from Super Trainer Elise Joan.
data.descriptionLong: Stay fit and strong during your pre- and postnatal journey with these exclusive hybrid workouts from Super Trainer Elise Joan. Each 30-minute session includes both cycling and low-impact resistance training, providing a safe and effective exercise experience that will bolster your body and support your pregnancy without zapping your energy.

2Y1ZDDXEx3aLPbgAHe1aHZ.title: 9 Pregnancy Ball Exercises for Expecting Moms

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQyOOG.title: Meet Elise
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQyOOG.descriptionLong: Get to know Super Trainer Elise Joan as she shares her story.

trainers.bio:
"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZBym4R.title: Barre Blend
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZBym4R.description: Get lean and toned with a mix of ballet barre, Pilates, and cardio.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZBym4R.descriptionShort: Get lean and toned with a mix of ballet barre, Pilates, and cardio.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZBym4R.descriptionLong: Create a lean, toned physique through a fun fusion of ballet barre, Pilates, and cardio interval training. Feel the burn as you sweat, stretch, and strengthen to energize your entire body.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZDbc5D.title: 3 Week Yoga Retreat
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZDbc5D.description: Want to learn Yoga? Master the fundamentals of yoga at home in just 21 days.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZDbc5D.descriptionShort: Want to learn Yoga? Master the fundamentals of yoga at home in just 21 days.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZDbc5D.descriptionLong: Created with beginners in mind, 3 Week Yoga Retreat will teach you simple, pure yoga for life-changing results. You'll build the skills you need to take any yoga class after these three weeks.​

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZFsUmh.title: Pre and Post-Natal Barre Blend
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZFsUmh.description: Optimize your pregnancy with these safe effective total body workouts.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZFsUmh.descriptionShort: Optimize your pregnancy with these safe effective total body workouts.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZFsUmh.descriptionLong: Help optimize your pregnancy journey with the performance-based program that blends barre, Pilates, and cardio interval training in safe and effective total-body workouts.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHIzqx.title: Pre and Post Natal Fitness
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHIzqx.description: Feel healthier now and after your baby arrives with these safe, simple workouts.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHIzqx.descriptionShort: Feel healthier now and after your baby arrives with these safe, simple workouts.
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHIzqx.descriptionLong: A healthy lifestyle means a happier mom. With Pre and Postnatal fitness and nutrition, you’ll discover how to care for your changing body during each stage of pregnancy, and after.
